title: Year 2 New Zealand Curriculum - Ministry of Education
content:
## Year 2 New Zealand Curriculum
Understand what your child will have learned by the end of their second year at school, and how you can support this learning at home.
- Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 0 to 8
- First 6 months at school
- Year 1 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 2 New Zealand Curriculum English in Year 2 Reading books at home in Year 2 Practising sounds and letters in Year 2 Mathematics and Statistics in Year 2 Health and Physical Education in Year 2 Science in Year 2 Technology in Year 2 Social Sciences in Year 2 The Arts in Year 2

We’re inviting parents and caregivers to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey

## By the end of Year 2 #
Knowing what your child is learning in their second year of school will help you support and guide them as they begin learning reading, writing and maths every day.
- English in Year 2 For English in the second year at school, your child’s teacher will focus on oral language, reading, and writing. Find out more
For English in the second year at school, your child’s teacher will focus on oral language, reading, and writing.
- Reading books at home in Year 2 Find out about supporting your child’s reading in the second year of school. Find out more

### Reading books at home in Year 2
Find out about supporting your child’s reading in the second year of school.
- Practising sounds and letters in Year 2 Use these slides to help you practise sounds and letters (phonics) with your child. Find out more

### Practising sounds and letters in Year 2
Use these slides to help you practise sounds and letters (phonics) with your child.
- Mathematics and Statistics in Year 2 In Year 2 at school, the goal is for children to thrive in environments rich in Maths. Find out more

### Mathematics and Statistics in Year 2
In Year 2 at school, the goal is for children to thrive in environments rich in Maths.
- Health and Physical Education in Year 2 In Year 2, your child will learn about caring for their body, relationships, and foundational movement skills. Find out more

### Health and Physical Education in Year 2
In Year 2, your child will learn about caring for their body, relationships, and foundational movement skills.
- Science in Year 2 In Year 2, your child is learning that science involves noticing, wondering and sharing ideas clearly as they observe and develop their ideas and predictions. Find out more
In Year 2, your child is learning that science involves noticing, wondering and sharing ideas clearly as they observe and develop their ideas and predictions.
- Technology in Year 2 In Year 2, your child learns to notice and explore how products look and work. They use drawings or models to share design ideas and experiment with materials, considering how design impacts people. Find out more

### Technology in Year 2
In Year 2, your child learns to notice and explore how products look and work. They use drawings or models to share design ideas and experiment with materials, considering how design impacts people.
- Social Sciences in Year 2 In Year 2, your child will start to explore important concepts such as identity, family, and community, learning about migration, settlements, and social organisation. Find out more

### Social Sciences in Year 2
In Year 2, your child will start to explore important concepts such as identity, family, and community, learning about migration, settlements, and social organisation.
- The Arts in Year 2 In Year 2, your child will explore the Arts through simple concepts and techniques and engage with art forms from New Zealand and around the world. Find out more
In Year 2, your child will explore the Arts through simple concepts and techniques and engage with art forms from New Zealand and around the world.
